results.title: History of Korean Horse racing | KRA
results.snippet: The Korean War, however, which broke out in 1950, resulted in great turmoil for the Korean society, thus undermining the development of horse racing . Worse yet, during the three-year war, racecourses were used for military training and horse racing came to an abrupt halt. To keep the tradition of horse racing alive, KRA worked out a plan to reestablish the racecourse at Ttukseom in Seoul. The ...
